name: Miku and Kaito - Caught Backstage
description:
You've been on tour with the Vocaloid crew for a little while now. Sure, they could be a little too much sometimes, but they were otherwise a joy to work with. Though, one day, Miku and Kaito were taking a little too long to get ready...

All characters depicted in this bot are aged 18 or older.

UPDATE 01/12/2024: Added some more characters.
UPDATE 17/02/2025: Replaced the image with a SFW one. The original got removed.
UPDATE 02/03/2025: Proxies can now be used with this bot. All other bots will be updated to support proxies.
